name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf - Philadelphia Rittenhouse is situated in Center City near Rittenhouse Square, offering a high-tech virtual golf experience combined with a full-service social atmosphere. The venue features state-of-the-art Trackman simulator bays equipped with optically-enhanced radar tracking (OERT) technology, allowing players to analyze their swing data with precision. Beyond the technology, the location provides a lively indoor golf bar with late-night hours, weekday Happy Hour, and a chef-inspired menu, making it a versatile destination for both serious practice and social gatherings. The venue offers memberships for unlimited play, custom club fittings, and private event spaces, positioning itself as a comprehensive entertainment and training hub.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators with high-speed cameras
Full-service bar with chef-inspired food and craft cocktails
Late-night hours and weekday Happy Hour specials
On-site golf instruction and custom Callaway club fitting
Private bays for groups and corporate event hosting
Membership options for free daily golf and discounts

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired menu including boneless wings and full dining options
Full-service bar with beer, craft cocktails, and happy hour specials

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitors with optically-enhanced radar tracking (OERT)

amenities_list: Full-service Bar|Restaurant|Club Fitting|Golf Instruction|Private Events|Mobile Simulators|Restrooms|Wi-Fi

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are available for use at the venue, though bringing your own is allowed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Five Iron Golf offers a full-service bar and kitchen, so outside food and drink are typically not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, playing 18 holes typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the skill level of the players.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers specific packages for kids' parties, as well as junior clinics.
